'''dhadhïflïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arack|arack]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arack|arack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| dhadhïflïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhædhïflïfth || dhædhïflïfj || dhædhïflïfsh || dhædhïflïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhadhïfdhïflïfth || dhadhïfdhïflïfj || dhadhïfdhïflïfsh || dhadhïfdhïflïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhadhïflïfth || dhadhïflïfj || dhadhïflïfsh || dhadhïflïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhadhïfflïffth || dhadhïfflïffj || dhadhïfflïffsh || dhadhïfflïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhadhïflïfïf || dhadhïflïfïf || dhadhïflïfïf || dhadhïflïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhadhïflïfth || dhadhïflïfj || dhadhïflïfsh || dhadhïflïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhadhïflïfïfl || dhadhïflïfïfl || dhadhïflïfïfl || dhadhïflïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhadhïflïfïfïf || dhadhïflïfïfïf || dhadhïflïfïfïf || dhadhïflïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhadhïflïfïfn || dhadhïflïfïfn || dhadhïflïfïfn || dhadhïflïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhadhïflïfïforo || dhadhïflïfïforo || dhadhïflïfïforo || dhadhïflïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
